overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character exploring a dark, abandoned urban environment at night. The character walks through narrow alleys, a courtyard with a red phone booth, and under a bridge in a post-apocalyptic London setting (Southwark). The atmosphere is moody and desolate with overgrown vegetation and derelict buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between brick buildings with abandoned bus

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a narrow alleyway between tall brick buildings, passing a red double-decker bus on the left

entered.detail: abandoned red double-decker bus with broken windows, partially blocking the alley
tall brick wall with arched windows and metal pipes running vertically
weathered brick facade with boarded-up windows and overgrown weeds at base
scattered rubble and trash accumulated against the right wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dark alleyway flanked by tall brick buildings. A derelict red double-decker bus sits on the left side, partially blocking the path. The ground is cracked concrete with scattered debris, and the area is dimly lit by ambient light from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: small courtyard with overgrown vegetation and red phone booth

events.description: character turns left entering a small open courtyard with a red phone booth and overgrown ivy wall

agents.ego_description: turning left into a courtyard, walking past a bicycle and examining the area near a red phone booth with 'Keep Calm' signage

entered.detail: classic British red telephone box with 'Keep Calm' poster visible inside, surrounded by overgrowth
abandoned bicycle leaning against a low wall near outdoor seating
tall brick wall completely covered in thick ivy and vines with twisted tree branches
wooden table and chairs with a bottle on it, suggesting a former outdoor dining area

segments.scene_description: The character enters a small courtyard featuring a prominent red British phone booth on the right. The back wall is entirely covered in dense ivy and twisted vegetation. An abandoned bicycle and outdoor seating area sit to the left. The lighting is slightly brighter here with mixed shadows from surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between derelict buildings leading to wider street

events.description: exits the courtyard through a brick archway into a narrow alley with view of distant bridge

agents.ego_description: leaving the courtyard through an archway and continuing down a narrow passage toward a more open area

entered.detail: arched brick passageway connecting the courtyard to the main street
half-timbered building facade with exposed wooden beams and broken windows

segments.scene_description: The character exits the courtyard through a brick archway into a narrower passage. A derelict Tudor-style building with exposed timber framing appears on the left. The path leads toward a more open street with a stone bridge visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned street with derelict buildings and abandoned vehicles

events.description: character walks past an abandoned red car on the right, moving toward a large stone bridge

agents.ego_description: walking down a wide cracked street past abandoned vehicles, approaching a large stone bridge arch

entered.detail: derelict red sedan with broken windows and rust, parked on the cracked street
large stone railway or road bridge with heavy arch spanning the street ahead
orange and white striped construction barriers blocking off a side area
rusted military-style truck parked on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider abandoned street with cracked asphalt. An abandoned red car sits on the right, while a derelict Tudor building looms closer on the left. The character walks toward a massive stone bridge arch in the distance, passing construction barricades and a rusted truck.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass beneath a large bridge with abandoned vehicles

events.description: enters the deep shadow under the bridge, visibility drops significantly as the area becomes much darker

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark underpass beneath the bridge, navigating between abandoned vehicles

entered.detail: dark tunnel-like space beneath the stone bridge with heavy shadows and limited visibility
second abandoned red double-decker bus, more derelict, blocking part of the path under the bridge

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark, confined underpass beneath the large bridge. Visibility drops dramatically as the lighting shifts to near-blackness. A derelict red double-decker bus blocks part of the path on the right. The atmosphere becomes claustrophobic and ominous as the character continues through the shadowy tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a desolate urban landscape that transitions from narrow, dimly lit alleys into a wide abandoned street before descending into a claustrophobic underpass. It begins by weaving through a dark alleyway past a derelict red double-decker bus, moving forward as the space opens into a small courtyard featuring a red phone booth and walls draped in dense ivy. The camera then passes through a brick archway and alongside a timber-framed Tudor building, as the path expands into a wider street filled with cracked asphalt, construction barricades, and a rusted truck. This open vista gradually narrows as the character approaches a massive stone bridge, finally entering a dark, confined underpass where visibility drops to near-blackness and another abandoned bus looms in the shadows.
